name: Mitigation of Related Taxes Under Different Chapters

eligibility.description: Applies when an amount was erroneously treated as self-employment income instead of wages (or vice versa) and the correction of the error is barred by law for one tax but authorized for the other.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows for the recovery of overpaid self-employment tax or FICA tax even if the statute of limitations has expired, provided there is a corresponding assessment of the other tax due to an error in classification.
